title: Dashboard Runtime Summary CI Schema Fix
goal: Repair the post-merge dashboard backend regression by aligning platform summary tests with the runtime schema that GetSummary now depends on in CI.

in: dashboard platform backend test setup for runtime summary coverage
minimal runtime schema migration used by dashboard service tests
regression coverage for auth session, login log, and menu tables required by GetSummary
out: dashboard frontend layout or todo i18n behavior
unrelated IAM, role, permission, seed, or lowcode work

implementationNotes: The merged dashboard change now calls authsession runtime helpers during GetSummary, so the existing test fixture must provision the runtime tables those helpers query.
The fix stays in test code because CI failed on missing tables rather than incorrect production behavior.
The shared migration helper keeps both dashboard tests on the same minimal runtime schema.

designGate: CI failure root cause captured from GitHub Actions logs
developmentGate: test-only fix stays scoped to dashboard runtime schema setup

affectedSubgraph: platform dashboard tests -> dashboard service -> authsession runtime helpers -> runtime tables

runtimeEvidence: GitHub Actions backend failure log for PR #136
local platform go test run in fix/dashboard-ci-runtime-schema worktree

completionChecklist: repair PR opened for post-merge CI regression
